description: capital city of Georgia, United States
description_wiki: Atlanta is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Georgia.

description: city in Kern County, California, United States
description_wiki: Taft (formerly Moron, Moro, and Siding Number Two) is a city in the foothills at the extreme southwestern edge of the San Joaquin Valley, in Kern County, California.

surface_forms: Mr. Bryant's mother died in Alabama
description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Alabama ( , AL-ə-BAM-ə) is a state in the Southeastern and Deep Southern regions of the United States.

description: consolidated city-county in Richmond County, Georgia, United States
description_wiki: Augusta is a city on the central eastern border of the U.S. state of Georgia and the county seat of Richmond County.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Virginia, officially the Commonwealth of Virginia, is a state in the Southeastern and Mid-Atlantic regions of the United States between the Atlantic Coast and the Appalachian Mountains.
